data.content: Updated loom/knots_sdlc/prompts/implementation.md, implementation_review.md, shipment.md, and shipment_review.md to mirror the delivery-target-explicit wording from the built-in skills prompts while keeping the frontmatter intact. Added src/loom_compat_bundle.rs coverage to assert the embedded loom prompt fixtures still include the output-specific branch, PR, main, and merged-PR guidance. Validation: cargo test builtin_loom_prompts_include_output_specific_delivery_targets; make sanity. Branch: knots-3239-profile-delivery-targets. Commit: f79e42ad07a8.
